summary.sosovalue: Low volume community activity dominated by promotional referral spam and farming posts for airdrop/EXP rewards. Posts share SoSoValue research links on crypto topics like BNB, Chainlink, and praise integration with Bybit's TradeGPT. No negative sentiment observed; appears positive but inorganic.
